summary_en: 出光興産 authorised a share buyback. Direct return of capital and a signal management views shares as undervalued.
summary_jp: 出光興産が自己株式取得を決議。資本還元と株価評価のシグナル。

summary_en: 出光興産 cancelled treasury stock. Permanent share-count reduction lifts per-share economics.
summary_jp: 出光興産が自己株式消却を実施。発行済株式数が恒久的に減少。
